user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.75, distrusted_peers=['r1c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical SoC (37%, ~22 min autonomy). Network-wide deficit crisis detected. R2c2 flagged as distrusted by r1c1. All outbound sharing suspended to prevent battery depletion. Aggregator must prioritize grid reconnection. No new commitments until SoC > 75%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
